name: shape-survivor
description: Shape Survivor HTML5 canvas game shipped as an iOS app via Capacitor.

scripts.sync: cp assets/app-icon-1024.png app-icon.png && cp index.html www/index.html && cp manifest.json www/manifest.json && cp sw.js www/sw.js && cp app-icon.png www/app-icon.png && node /Users/ahmedalemadi/Desktop/earth-defender/node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor copy ios

author: Ahmed Alemadi
